title: Donatello.
content:
Child of the North, within thy Northern eyes
    How brood and burn the restless mysteries!
    Blooded of Hellas, thy dark brows between,
    That spray of antique laurel, how serene!
meaning:
Margaret Steele Anderson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Donatello."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
